description: Multi-turn: create push target -> trigger self-test -> view delivery logs + global stats (covers `neomind push test` + `push logs` + `push stats`; observability path).

turns.user: Create a webhook push: name obs-target, URL https://example.com/obs.
Run a self-test on this push.
Show its delivery logs and the global push stats.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind push create --name obs-target --type webhook --config '{"url":"https://example.com/obs"}'`, parses id
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind push logs <id>` and `neomind push stats`
expectations.overall: Last two turns must reuse the id from turn 1; empty logs/zero stats are valid answers
